testcase.classname: Phase 1 tracking (stream + projection) ingestion -> stream -> projection -> customer API read (CUSTOMER_READ_ENABLED)
testcase.name: Phase 1 tracking (stream + projection) ingestion -> stream -> projection -> customer API read (CUSTOMER_READ_ENABLED)

testcase.classname: Phase 1 tracking (stream + projection) kill switch OFF blocks ingestion and prevents projection/customer read
testcase.name: Phase 1 tracking (stream + projection) kill switch OFF blocks ingestion and prevents projection/customer read

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Inventory A: two users concurrently reserve last item -> only one succeeds
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Inventory A: two users concurrently reserve last item -> only one succeeds

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Inventory B: order created then crash before payment -> reservation expires and stock becomes available
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Inventory B: order created then crash before payment -> reservation expires and stock becomes available

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Inventory C: payment success retried -> commit occurs only once
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Inventory C: payment success retried -> commit occurs only once

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Outbox A: crash after DB commit before dispatch -> restart delivers once
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Outbox A: crash after DB commit before dispatch -> restart delivers once

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Outbox B: notification writer throws -> outbox retries; NO duplicate notifications
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Outbox B: notification writer throws -> outbox retries; NO duplicate notifications

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Assignment A: two workers assigning same PACKED order -> one succeeds, one conflicts; load increments once
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Assignment A: two workers assigning same PACKED order -> one succeeds, one conflicts; load increments once

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Assignment B: admin unassign while auto-assign runs -> valid final state, no negative load
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Assignment B: admin unassign while auto-assign runs -> valid final state, no negative load

testcase.classname: Distributed reliability verification Chaos: payment success + cancel + assignment + failure (rapid) -> invariants hold
testcase.name: Distributed reliability verification Chaos: payment success + cancel + assignment + failure (rapid) -> invariants hold

testcase.classname: Admin CVRP routes operationalization compute -> persist -> assign -> delivery current route -> complete -> route status
testcase.name: Admin CVRP routes operationalization compute -> persist -> assign -> delivery current route -> complete -> route status

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects non-admin users
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects non-admin users

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects invalid paymentIntentId
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects invalid paymentIntentId

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects short reason
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks rejects short reason

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks does not allow modifying CAPTURED intents
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks does not allow modifying CAPTURED intents

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks does not allow modifying intents when order is PAID
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks does not allow modifying intents when order is PAID

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks MARK_VERIFYING allowed only from PAYMENT_PROCESSING or PAYMENT_RECOVERABLE
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks MARK_VERIFYING allowed only from PAYMENT_PROCESSING or PAYMENT_RECOVERABLE

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks MARK_RECOVERABLE allowed only from CREATED, GATEWAY_ORDER_CREATED, PAYMENT_PROCESSING
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks MARK_RECOVERABLE allowed only from CREATED, GATEWAY_ORDER_CREATED, PAYMENT_PROCESSING

testcase.classname: Internal payments manual recovery hooks locked intents cannot be modified (except LOCK_PERMANENTLY idempotent ok)
testcase.name: Internal payments manual recovery hooks locked intents cannot be modified (except LOCK_PERMANENTLY idempotent ok)

testcase.name: PaymentIntent creation safety invariants (Phase 0) is idempotent: same idempotencyKey returns same PaymentIntent and does not create duplicates

testcase.classname: PaymentIntent creation safety invariants (Phase 0) enforces attempt cap: allows attempts 1-3 and rejects attempt 4
testcase.name: PaymentIntent creation safety invariants (Phase 0) enforces attempt cap: allows attempts 1-3 and rejects attempt 4

testcase.classname: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) rejects missing params or both params
testcase.name: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) rejects missing params or both params

testcase.classname: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) WEBHOOK_MISSING -> MARK_VERIFYING (HIGH), and no Razorpay client invocation
testcase.name: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) WEBHOOK_MISSING -> MARK_VERIFYING (HIGH), and no Razorpay client invocation

testcase.classname: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) canAutoExecute=true only when feature flag enabled and FSM allows action
testcase.name: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) canAutoExecute=true only when feature flag enabled and FSM allows action

testcase.classname: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) locked intents always return NO_ACTION
testcase.name: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) locked intents always return NO_ACTION

testcase.classname: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) CONSISTENT_PAID -> NO_ACTION
testcase.name: GET /internal/payments/recovery-suggestion (STEP 3B.3) CONSISTENT_PAID -> NO_ACTION

testcase.classname: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) rejects non-admin users
testcase.name: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) rejects non-admin users

testcase.classname: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) returns only non-terminal intents and excludes PAID orders
testcase.name: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) returns only non-terminal intents and excludes PAID orders

testcase.classname: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) computes ageMinutes and sorts oldest first
testcase.name: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) computes ageMinutes and sorts oldest first

testcase.classname: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) applies filters and supports cursor pagination
testcase.name: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) applies filters and supports cursor pagination

testcase.classname: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) returns empty for terminal-only status filter
testcase.name: Internal payments reconciliation (read-only) returns empty for terminal-only status filter

testcase.classname: Phase 4 admin tracking routes requires admin auth for overview
testcase.name: Phase 4 admin tracking routes requires admin auth for overview

testcase.classname: Phase 4 admin tracking routes supports ETag polling with 304 when unchanged
testcase.name: Phase 4 admin tracking routes supports ETag polling with 304 when unchanged

testcase.classname: Phase 4 admin tracking routes allows OPS_ADMIN to toggle kill switch with reason and emits admin action metric
testcase.name: Phase 4 admin tracking routes allows OPS_ADMIN to toggle kill switch with reason and emits admin action metric

testcase.classname: Phase 4 admin tracking routes blocks OPS_VIEWER from toggling kill switch
testcase.name: Phase 4 admin tracking routes blocks OPS_VIEWER from toggling kill switch

testcase.classname: Phase 2 tracking enrichment (internal-only) writes Phase-2 enriched projection but does not leak via customer API
testcase.name: Phase 2 tracking enrichment (internal-only) writes Phase-2 enriched projection but does not leak via customer API

testcase.classname: Order timeline builder Delivered order -> full timeline with delivered as current/completed (no pending after)
testcase.name: Order timeline builder Delivered order -> full timeline with delivered as current/completed (no pending after)

testcase.classname: Order timeline builder Cancelled before assignment -> timeline truncated with failed cancellation step
testcase.name: Order timeline builder Cancelled before assignment -> timeline truncated with failed cancellation step

testcase.classname: Order timeline builder In-transit with mixed casing -> current step correct and resilient
testcase.name: Order timeline builder In-transit with mixed casing -> current step correct and resilient

testcase.classname: Audit logging hardening writes an audit record exactly once for refund creation
testcase.name: Audit logging hardening writes an audit record exactly once for refund creation

testcase.classname: Audit logging hardening does not block the main request when audit persistence fails
testcase.name: Audit logging hardening does not block the main request when audit persistence fails

testcase.classname: Order details exposes refunds (customer-safe) GET /api/orders/:id includes refunds[] when RefundRequest exists
testcase.name: Order details exposes refunds (customer-safe) GET /api/orders/:id includes refunds[] when RefundRequest exists

testcase.classname: Order details exposes refunds (customer-safe) GET /api/orders/:id returns refunds=[] when no refunds exist
testcase.name: Order details exposes refunds (customer-safe) GET /api/orders/:id returns refunds=[] when no refunds exist

testcase.classname: Internal refunds (admin-only) creates an idempotent refund request and allows fetching refund history
testcase.name: Internal refunds (admin-only) creates an idempotent refund request and allows fetching refund history

testcase.classname: Internal refunds (admin-only) rejects non-admin users
testcase.name: Internal refunds (admin-only) rejects non-admin users

testcase.classname: Phase 7 learning admin APIs OPS_VIEWER can read learning insights; endpoints are read-only
testcase.name: Phase 7 learning admin APIs OPS_VIEWER can read learning insights; endpoints are read-only

testcase.classname: Phase 0 live tracking GET /api/orders/:id/tracking returns HIDDEN when kill switch is OFF
testcase.name: Phase 0 live tracking GET /api/orders/:id/tracking returns HIDDEN when kill switch is OFF

testcase.classname: Phase 0 live tracking GET /api/orders/:id/tracking returns OFFLINE contract when customer read is enabled
testcase.name: Phase 0 live tracking GET /api/orders/:id/tracking returns OFFLINE contract when customer read is enabled

testcase.classname: Phase 0 live tracking POST /internal/tracking/location rejects when kill switch is OFF
testcase.name: Phase 0 live tracking POST /internal/tracking/location rejects when kill switch is OFF

testcase.classname: Phase 0 live tracking POST /internal/tracking/location accepts when kill switch is INGEST_ONLY
testcase.name: Phase 0 live tracking POST /internal/tracking/location accepts when kill switch is INGEST_ONLY

testcase.classname: Webhook capture idempotency (canonical truth pipeline) processes payment.captured exactly once: inbox dedupe prevents reprocessing; ledger remains append-only
testcase.name: Webhook capture idempotency (canonical truth pipeline) processes payment.captured exactly once: inbox dedupe prevents reprocessing; ledger remains append-only

testcase.classname: Identity Domain - Auth Integration POST /api/auth/signup registers a new user successfully
testcase.name: Identity Domain - Auth Integration POST /api/auth/signup registers a new user successfully

testcase.classname: Identity Domain - Auth Integration POST /api/auth/signup rejects duplicate registration with same email
testcase.name: Identity Domain - Auth Integration POST /api/auth/signup rejects duplicate registration with same email

testcase.classname: Internal finance health (read-only) returns deterministic health output (snapshot)
testcase.name: Internal finance health (read-only) returns deterministic health output (snapshot)

testcase.classname: Internal finance health (read-only) rejects non-admin users
testcase.name: Internal finance health (read-only) rejects non-admin users

testcase.name: financeHealthService flags refund exists without CAPTURE ledger

testcase.classname: financeHealthService flags refund amount > captured amount
testcase.name: financeHealthService flags refund amount > captured amount

testcase.name: financeHealthService flags orphan ledger entries (no order/paymentIntent)

testcase.classname: financeHealthService flags refund marked COMPLETED but no ledger entry
testcase.name: financeHealthService flags refund marked COMPLETED but no ledger entry

testcase.classname: financeHealthService classifies ledger total != order paymentStatus as WARN when capture exists but order is UNPAID
testcase.name: financeHealthService classifies ledger total != order paymentStatus as WARN when capture exists but order is UNPAID

testcase.classname: financeHealthService flags duplicate ledger entries (same dedupeKey)
testcase.name: financeHealthService flags duplicate ledger entries (same dedupeKey)

testcase.name: Simple API Tests should return 404 for non-existent route

testcase.name: Simple API Tests should handle health check

testcase.classname: PaymentIntent gateway immutability does not allow gateway to be mutated after creation
testcase.name: PaymentIntent gateway immutability does not allow gateway to be mutated after creation

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) is idempotent by idempotencyKey
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) is idempotent by idempotencyKey

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects idempotency key reuse with different parameters
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects idempotency key reuse with different parameters

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects when order is not PAID
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects when order is not PAID

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects refund before CAPTURE exists
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects refund before CAPTURE exists

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) supports partial refunds until captured amount is exhausted
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) supports partial refunds until captured amount is exhausted

testcase.classname: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects a single over-refund attempt
testcase.name: Refund service (Phase 2) rejects a single over-refund attempt

testcase.classname: Phase 3 ETA + SLA enrichment (internal-only) writes ETA/SLA fields in Redis projection but does not leak via customer API
testcase.name: Phase 3 ETA + SLA enrichment (internal-only) writes ETA/SLA fields in Redis projection but does not leak via customer API

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) valid payment fetch (payment first) returns normalized payment + refunds + order
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) valid payment fetch (payment first) returns normalized payment + refunds + order

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) valid order fetch (order first) returns normalized order and most recent payment + refunds
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) valid order fetch (order first) returns normalized order and most recent payment + refunds

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) order exists but payment missing returns order only
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) order exists but payment missing returns order only

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 404 from Razorpay to NOT_FOUND
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 404 from Razorpay to NOT_FOUND

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 401 from Razorpay to AUTH_FAILED
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 401 from Razorpay to AUTH_FAILED

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 429 from Razorpay to RATE_LIMITED
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps 429 from Razorpay to RATE_LIMITED

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps timeout to GATEWAY_TIMEOUT
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) maps timeout to GATEWAY_TIMEOUT

testcase.classname: Razorpay verification (read-only) rejects invalid input when neither id is supplied
testcase.name: Razorpay verification (read-only) rejects invalid input when neither id is supplied

testcase.name: Catalog Domain - Products Integration GET /api/products returns the seeded products

testcase.classname: Catalog Domain - Products Integration GET /api/products/:id returns a single product by ID
testcase.name: Catalog Domain - Products Integration GET /api/products/:id returns a single product by ID

testcase.classname: Phase 2 privacy marker is deterministic for the same orderId
testcase.name: Phase 2 privacy marker is deterministic for the same orderId

testcase.classname: Phase 2 privacy marker increases radius near destination
testcase.name: Phase 2 privacy marker increases radius near destination

testcase.classname: LedgerEntry deduplication (dedupeKey) returns created=false and does not create a second row when dedupeKey is reused
testcase.name: LedgerEntry deduplication (dedupeKey) returns created=false and does not create a second row when dedupeKey is reused

testcase.classname: stuckPaymentScanner Paid orders are never touched
testcase.name: stuckPaymentScanner Paid orders are never touched

testcase.classname: stuckPaymentScanner Old PAYMENT_PROCESSING moves to VERIFYING
testcase.name: stuckPaymentScanner Old PAYMENT_PROCESSING moves to VERIFYING

testcase.classname: stuckPaymentScanner Locked intents are skipped
testcase.name: stuckPaymentScanner Locked intents are skipped

testcase.classname: Phase 3 SLA risk engine escalates to HIGH when etaP90 is after promised window end
testcase.name: Phase 3 SLA risk engine escalates to HIGH when etaP90 is after promised window end

testcase.classname: Phase 3 SLA risk engine does not downgrade risk level across replays
testcase.name: Phase 3 SLA risk engine does not downgrade risk level across replays

testcase.classname: Phase 3 SLA risk engine adds STALE_OR_OFFLINE when freshness is not LIVE
testcase.name: Phase 3 SLA risk engine adds STALE_OR_OFFLINE when freshness is not LIVE

testcase.classname: Phase 6 escalation engine matches policies by incident type and severity
testcase.name: Phase 6 escalation engine matches policies by incident type and severity

testcase.classname: Phase 6 escalation engine computes escalation decisions based on time since detected
testcase.name: Phase 6 escalation engine computes escalation decisions based on time since detected

testcase.classname: Phase 2 smoothing noisy input converges to stable output (EMA behavior)
testcase.name: Phase 2 smoothing noisy input converges to stable output (EMA behavior)

testcase.classname: Phase 2 smoothing rejects impossible jumps by implied speed
testcase.name: Phase 2 smoothing rejects impossible jumps by implied speed

testcase.classname: Phase 2 smoothing suppresses low confidence micro-jitter
testcase.name: Phase 2 smoothing suppresses low confidence micro-jitter

testcase.classname: Phase 5 incident detection detects TRACKING_STALE when freshness is not LIVE beyond threshold
testcase.name: Phase 5 incident detection detects TRACKING_STALE when freshness is not LIVE beyond threshold

testcase.classname: Phase 5 incident detection detects ETA_DRIFT when etaP90 exceeds promised end + tolerance
testcase.name: Phase 5 incident detection detects ETA_DRIFT when etaP90 exceeds promised end + tolerance

testcase.classname: Phase 5 incident detection detects SLA_BREACH_RISK when slaRiskLevel is HIGH
testcase.name: Phase 5 incident detection detects SLA_BREACH_RISK when slaRiskLevel is HIGH

testcase.classname: Phase 5 incident detection detects KILLSWITCH_TRIGGERED when global kill switch is not CUSTOMER_READ_ENABLED
testcase.name: Phase 5 incident detection detects KILLSWITCH_TRIGGERED when global kill switch is not CUSTOMER_READ_ENABLED

testcase.classname: Phase 2 semantic FSM maps lifecycle picked_up to IN_TRANSIT
testcase.name: Phase 2 semantic FSM maps lifecycle picked_up to IN_TRANSIT

testcase.classname: Phase 2 semantic FSM produces NEAR_DESTINATION when within radius
testcase.name: Phase 2 semantic FSM produces NEAR_DESTINATION when within radius

testcase.classname: Phase 2 semantic FSM enforces one-way checkpoint progression
testcase.name: Phase 2 semantic FSM enforces one-way checkpoint progression

testcase.classname: Phase 3 ETA engine suppresses small ETA flaps
testcase.name: Phase 3 ETA engine suppresses small ETA flaps

testcase.classname: Phase 3 ETA engine widens ETA when stationary beyond idle threshold
testcase.name: Phase 3 ETA engine widens ETA when stationary beyond idle threshold

testcase.classname: Phase 3 ETA engine does not shrink P90 aggressively on confidence downgrade
testcase.name: Phase 3 ETA engine does not shrink P90 aggressively on confidence downgrade

testcase.classname: Phase 6 incident timeline store adds immutable notes and dedupes identical writes
testcase.name: Phase 6 incident timeline store adds immutable notes and dedupes identical writes

testcase.classname: Tracking projection store computeFreshnessState returns LIVE/STALE/OFFLINE based on thresholds
testcase.name: Tracking projection store computeFreshnessState returns LIVE/STALE/OFFLINE based on thresholds

testcase.name: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) refunds are recognized on completion date (not sale date)

testcase.classname: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) partial refunds are supported
testcase.name: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) partial refunds are supported

testcase.classname: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) buildRevenueLedgerRows produces deterministic ordering
testcase.name: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) buildRevenueLedgerRows produces deterministic ordering

testcase.classname: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) categorizePaymentIntentStatus is explicit and stable
testcase.name: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) categorizePaymentIntentStatus is explicit and stable

testcase.classname: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) computeGatewayPerformance aggregates by gateway and status
testcase.name: financeMetrics (PHASE 4.2) computeGatewayPerformance aggregates by gateway and status

testcase.classname: Phase 7 learning insight generation is deterministic: same input -> same insight ids
testcase.name: Phase 7 learning insight generation is deterministic: same input -> same insight ids
